title: gladiolus hirsutus var. aphyllus
intro: Gladiolus hirsutus var. aphyllus, also known as the gladiolus or sword lily, is a type of plant that belongs to the iris family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as the ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Gladiolus hirsutus var. aphyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
